description: worker: SDXL nodes (SdxlLoadPipeline, SdxlTextEncode, SdxlSampler, SdxlDecode)
context: Implement worker/nodes/sdxl.py: all four SDXL nodes per ANVILML_DESIGN §14.6. SdxlTextEncode handles optional negative_prompt (empty string if absent). SdxlSampler: default steps=20, guidance_scale=7.5; cancel_flag via callback_on_step_end same pattern as ZitSampler; resolves seed=-1. Mock mode: same sentinel/stub pattern as zit.py. pytest worker/tests/test_nodes_sdxl.py exits 0 with ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1: output slots correct; SaveImage emits ImageReady.

description: End-to-end cancel path: CancelJob IPC -> Cancelled event -> DB status Cancelled
context: Verify the full cancel path works end-to-end with mock worker. In backend/tests/api_jobs.rs add test: submit job, job enters Running, POST /v1/jobs/:id/cancel->202, assert WS broadcasts job.cancelled, assert GET /v1/jobs/:id returns status=Cancelled. In worker mock mode the cancel_flag is checked between nodes; executor emits Cancelled before completing. Scheduler receives WorkerEvent::Cancelled, sets DB status=Cancelled, broadcasts WsEvent::JobCancelled. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware -- cancel exits 0.

description: Crash recovery: worker dead mid-job -> Failed + respawn + new job succeeds
context: Add backend/tests/api_crash.rs integration test: submit mock job so worker is Busy; force-close the worker's stdout pipe (or kill the child process via Child::kill in test helper); assert WS broadcasts worker.status=Dead then job.failed{error=worker_crashed}; assert WS broadcasts worker.status=Respawning then worker.status=Idle within 5s; submit second job and assert it completes successfully. All with ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 --features mock-hardware. cargo test -- crash exits 0.

description: CI: complete openapi-diff gate and full cross-platform test pass
context: Ensure CI is fully green across all jobs: Linux rust job (fmt+clippy+test+openapi-diff); Linux python-worker job (full pytest worker/tests/); Windows rust-windows job (clippy+test --features mock-hardware). cargo run -p anvilml-openapi regenerates backend/openapi.json; git diff --exit-code passes (schema is now complete and stable). Commit final openapi.json. Confirm cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0 on both platforms. This task is done when the last CI run on main shows all jobs green.

Replace stubs with working provisioning scripts per §21.4. install_worker_deps.sh: detect nvidia-smi->cuda, rocminfo->rocm, else cpu; create venv (prefer uv venv --python 3.12, fallback python3.12 -m venv); pip install base.txt then {backend}.txt; print torch version + device. install_worker_deps.ps1: same logic Windows-only (no rocm); use py -3.12 or uv; Scripts\ activate. Both exit non-zero with clear message if Python 3.12 not found.

Replace stub with working backend/scripts/test_inference.py per ANVILML_DESIGN §20.5: CLI --model-type zit|sdxl --model-path PATH --prompt TEXT --output PATH [--steps N] [--seed N] [--device cuda|rocm|cpu]. Loads the chosen pipeline directly (no IPC, no server) using the same node classes from worker/nodes/. Times wall-clock and prints VRAM before/after. Writes output PNG to --output path. Exits 0 on success, 1 on error with traceback. Script must be runnable with 'python backend/scripts/test_inference.py ...' from the repo root given an activated venv.
